title: Ukrainian Lamb Dumplings
description: Traditional Ukrainian dish featuring tender lamb-filled dumplings served in a flavorful broth.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine ground lamb, flour, egg, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add milk and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of chopped onion and minced garlic in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press edges together to seal.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat and cook dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer dumplings to a baking sheet and bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 15-20 minutes.
While dumplings are baking, prepare the broth by combining 4 cups of water with 2 cups of beef broth in a large pot.
Bring the broth to a boil and then reduce heat to low.
Serve the dumplings in the broth and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
